top_signals.title: Citi Joins Small Group of Banks Running London’s Gold Vaults
top_signals.summary: Citigroup Inc. has joined the small group of banks that provide the vaulting and clearing services that underpin the gold market in London, the world’s biggest bullion-trading center.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: EasyJet’s Stock Shows Castlelake Bid May Be Far From a Slam Dunk
top_signals.summary: Castlelake LP’s latest bid to buy EasyJet Plc reached £6.90 per share in cash, but the UK airline is trading below that even with Monday’s post-announcement bump, signaling investors may be concerned about the potential regulatory and political barriers facing the £5 billion-plus deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
